row.authorized_use_select_all: Inspections: Surveys and assessments of properties and assets.
row.summary_description_of_flight: Flight over Utilities Service Center to capture photos and video of supply storage area for the planning of an inventory organizing project. row.location_area_surveyed: Utilities Service Center storage yard and north parking lot.
row.privacy_risks_summary_of: None - Camera was focused on CBU property throughout flight.
row.privacy_risk_mitigation_action: Kept camera focused on CBU property throughout flight.

row.privacy_risks_summary_of: No PII Collected, oblique shots to show landscape

row.authorized_use_select_all: Construction Management: Inspection of project sites for contract and environmental compliance.;Marketing: Capture video and still photographs.
row.summary_description_of_flight: Site inspection of East Tank rehab project
row.street_address_area_surveyed: CBU East Storage Tank near the intersection of Bill Mallory Blvd and Hwy 446, orbital flight around the perimeter and approximately 50' above the top of the tank
row.location_area_surveyed: CBU East Storage Tank near the intersection of Bill Mallory Blvd and Hwy 446
row.privacy_risks_summary_of: Minimal - a few surrounding properties can be seen at the boarders of the images collected, but nothing was captured that couldn't be observed while driving down the street.
row.privacy_risk_mitigation_action: Focused the camera primarily on the East Tank to the extent possible given the flight area

row.authorized_use_select_all: Inspections: Surveys and assessments of properties and assets.;Mapping: Aerial photography for maps, land use mapping, geospatial analysis.

row.authorized_use_select_all: Marketing: Capture video and still photographs.
row.summary_description_of_flight: Video and photos taken of lift station located off of Indiana Bell CT on the south side of Park Ridge East Park
row.street_address_area_surveyed: Indiana Bell Ct. and E Morningside Drive - flight focused in 15 ft orbit around lift station with one lift shot capturing the horizon in the area
row.location_area_surveyed: Video and photos taken of lift station located off of Indiana Bell CT on the south side of Park Ridge East Park
row.privacy_risk_mitigation_action: The one shot taken of non-CBU property was focused on objects at a great distance with no discernable people or faces present.

row.authorized_use_select_all: Mapping: Aerial photography for maps, land use mapping, geospatial analysis.
row.summary_description_of_flight: Flight over Service Center storage yard for orthomosaic map generation
row.street_address_area_surveyed: 600 E Miller Drive/Henderson St. - planned route over entire storage yard at the service center
row.privacy_risks_summary_of: None - camera was focus on CBU property at all times
row.privacy_risk_mitigation_action: Camera was focused on CBU property at all times

row.authorized_use_select_all: Marketing: Capture video and still photographs.
row.summary_description_of_flight: Two flights capturing photos/videos of lift stations in a 40' orbit.
row.street_address_area_surveyed: Near - 3611 S Leonard Springs Rd, Near - 3328 W Woodhaven Dr, Near - 2929 S Olcott Blvd was cancelled due to obstacles
row.privacy_risk_mitigation_action: Kept camera focused on CBU property as much as possible

row.authorized_use_select_all: Inspections: Surveys and assessments of development sites, road improvements, traffic conditions.
row.summary_description_of_flight:
The main purpose of the flight plan will be for April 8th the day of the solar eclipse to monitor traffic conditions to assist with responding units by advising what streets are open. In the event there could be a fire or other emergency related item that a visual view of the area is possible if close to the operation of the flight. A visual view may be performed to advise incoming units.
For example if there is a report of smoke in the area that drone operations are being performed and the drone can verify that the smoke is not an emergency such as a grill, responders can be informed to be disregarded to reduce the risk of responding to an emergency call.
row.location_area_surveyed: Dunn Meadows, Switch Yard, and Kirkwood
row.privacy_risks_summary_of: Flights were above 150 feet, unable to identify individuals with the exception of City Employees.
row.privacy_risk_mitigation_action: Kept drone above buildings or vacant areas when hovering in case of failure to avoid individuals.

row.authorized_use_select_all: Marketing: Capture video and still photographs.
row.summary_description_of_flight: Photos/Videos captured of Blucher Wastewater Plant
row.privacy_risks_summary_of: None - photos and videos were only taken of CBU property
row.privacy_risk_mitigation_action: Kept camera focused on CBU property

row.authorized_use_select_all: Marketing: Capture video and still photographs.
row.summary_description_of_flight: Captured footage of CBU's new street sweeper in use.
row.street_address_area_surveyed: Side street located at 39.130257, -86.530986/S Walnut St. Completed a nadir shot while tracking the sweeper traveling west, orbiting shot of the truck going east, and post cleaning of the street and storm inlet.
row.privacy_risks_summary_of: None - video captured only CBU assets
row.privacy_risk_mitigation_action: An isolated road with no businesses/homes was chosen to minimize privacy and traffic concerns during the flight

row.authorized_use_select_all: Marketing: Capture video and still photographs.
row.summary_description_of_flight: Switchyard Park Maintenance Building solar panel roof installation photo and video footage. Video circling the new installation.
row.privacy_risk_mitigation_action: On-site construction personnel only, no members of Public on-site. Photos taken from height where it is difficult to discern anyone in the background.

row.authorized_use_select_all: Marketing: Capture video and still photographs.
row.summary_description_of_flight: Hopewell East photos of the area that will become Hopewell Commons
row.location_area_surveyed: Central area of the Hopewell Commons development located in the eastern portion of the future Hopewell Neighborhood
row.privacy_risk_mitigation_action: No PII collected, images and video collected at approximately 260 feet AGL to minimize any potential collection of PII. Footage of active construction site only.

row.authorized_use_select_all: Inspections: Surveys and assessments of properties and assets.;Training: Preplanning, assessment and evaluation of emergency response operations.
row.summary_description_of_flight: Training flight at Hopewell East. Secondary mission of collecting footage of construction progress for City of Bloomington Engineering Department
row.privacy_risk_mitigation_action: Active construction site only, photos from height to noly include construction and City personnel.

row.authorized_use_select_all: Marketing: Capture video and still photographs.
row.summary_description_of_flight: Broadview Neighborhood cleanup video and photo footage.
row.privacy_risk_mitigation_action: No PII collected due to media collection height

row.authorized_use_select_all: Marketing: Capture video and still photographs.
row.summary_description_of_flight: Captured photos and videos of Lake Monroe near the spillway
row.street_address_area_surveyed: 39.006752, -86.512574 - flight near Lake Monroe tower, pics and videos collected in a 100' orbit at a max AGL <300' 39.006614, -86.510252 - flight near Lake Monroe spillway - 750' orbit of spillway at a max AGL <300'
row.location_area_surveyed: At and around Lake Monroe Tailwaters
row.privacy_risks_summary_of: Minimal - pics and videos were taken at distance from anyone who may have been in frame.
row.privacy_risk_mitigation_action: Kept the camera focused on open areas as much as possible.

row.authorized_use_select_all: Inspections: Surveys and assessments of development sites, road improvements, traffic conditions.;Mapping: Aerial photography for maps, land use mapping, geospatial analysis.
row.summary_description_of_flight: Nadir imagery capture at the Hopewell East site for production of updated orthoimagery

row.authorized_use_select_all: Marketing: Capture video and still photographs.

row.authorized_use_select_all: Marketing: Capture video and still photographs.

row.authorized_use_select_all: Marketing: Capture video and still photographs.

row.privacy_risk_mitigation_action: Positioned myself and the UAV away from the gathering.
